description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house set within a walled property featuring a spacious green lawn, a freeform swimming pool, and several palm trees. The house itself is two stories tall, with a flat roof and a clean, white exterior punctuated by numerous rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The front of the property includes a paved driveway with multiple parking spaces and several parked cars, as well as a formal entryway with steps leading up to the main door. The backyard is designed for leisure, with poolside lounge chairs and landscaped greenery. The overall layout is open and expansive, with clear zones for recreation, parking, and entry. The architectural style is contemporary, emphasizing geometric forms and minimal ornamentation.
description: A large, modern two-story white house with a flat roof, surrounded by a walled yard featuring a pool, palm trees, and a driveway with parked cars. The design is clean and contemporary, with symmetrical windows and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the pool, lounge area, and the full length of the property with palm trees and the driveway visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, focusing on the main entryway, driveway, and symmetrical arrangement of windows and palm trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the house, emphasizing the backyard with the pool, green lawn, and the back facade of the building.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the house from the opposite side, with a clear view of the pool, palm trees, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by windows, and a paved driveway leading to the entrance, accented by palm trees and minimal decorative elements.
